title: ctenopteris longa
intro: Ctenopteris longa, also known as the Australian sword fern, is a type of plant native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ctenopteris longa include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
